title: Session and logout handling
description: Establish a server-side session on successful login carrying the authenticated user's identity, and add POST /auth/logout to clear it (optionally redirecting to Authentik's end-session endpoint).
acceptance_criteria: A successful /auth/callback establishes a session such that current_user is available on subsequent requests
POST /auth/logout clears the local session unconditionally, regardless of whether the Authentik end-session call succeeds
Session cookie uses the existing Flask secret_key mechanism, with a documented requirement that it be a real secret (not a default placeholder) once auth.enabled=true
Flash-message session behaviour that exists today continues to work unchanged when combined with an authenticated session
current_user is nullable/absent for anonymous requests and does not raise when unset
